what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG icon that draws a gear/settings-like symbol using a central circle plus radial and diagonal stroke segments.
observations: Uses an inline SVG element with xmlns, viewBox, width, and height set for a 24 by 24 icon.
Uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" so the icon inherits the current text color.
Sets stroke-width="1.5" with round line caps and joins.
Draws the center with a circle at cx="12", cy="12", r="3".
Draws the outer marks as one path containing vertical, horizontal, and diagonal line segments.
standouts: CurrentColor stroke makes the asset themeable from surrounding CSS.
The gear metaphor is constructed from separated straight strokes rather than an enclosing toothed outline.
All visible geometry is contained in one circle element and one path element.
conventions: Follows common icon conventions: 24x24 viewBox, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded stroke endings.
Keeps geometry declarative with basic SVG primitives.
notes: A compact stroke-based gear/settings SVG icon intended to inherit color from its rendering context.
questions: Is the separated-radial-mark treatment intended to represent a gear specifically, or a more general settings/control symbol?
purpose_vs_actual: The file name indicates a gear icon, and the SVG content draws a gear/settings-like icon, so the apparent purpose matches the content.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable settings/gear icon that can adapt to surrounding UI color without embedding fixed styling.
novelty: The icon suggests a gear through discrete radial and diagonal ticks instead of a continuous toothed gear outline.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable SVG settings/gear icon built from simple stroke primitives for use as an interface asset.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG gear/settings icon made from a central circle and radial straight-line strokes.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable theme-aware gear/settings icon asset in the design system.
